title: Dressrosa’s Hidden System Emerges
description: Pages 17–20 focus on dressrosa’s hidden system emerges, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
scene: This part follows Doflamingo Family, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #13, Unknown person #14, Unknown person #17 as the Straw Hats and Law reach Dressrosa, split into teams, and step into Doflamingo’s territory while the Mera Mera no Mi appears as bait.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: C.... Can we really afford to waste time so idly like this!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Calm down, now. We are pressed for time, but...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Instead of running around recklessly, we should try to gather info.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: BUT... DON'T YOU FIND IT STRANGE?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Even if it was an act, the King of this country just abandoned his throne this morning, no?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I would have thought there'd be some degree of panic, for sure.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: It was your damn face on the front page

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Your food... I'm sure you've been waiting, or not waiting!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Well, there's a legend in this country, even now, that some believe...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: They come out, and they don't come out.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Yes... it's pretty mysterious. Since hun- deeds of years ago ...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: So there you go, travelers!! Please be on guard

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: The only mystery here is you.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Is it those guys at the roulette making all that noise?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Those gangsters are taking that blind man

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: GO! It's gotta be white this time!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: Where... where did it end up? Please tell me!

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo Family
dialogue.text: How awful. That guy is a disgrace to Donquixote.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Damn. Can't catch a break today.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: Hey, you've gotta pay up now.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: ...No, it's this last time or bust!! I'm all in!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: This sure is profitable when Buffalo- San Ain't Around...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Well said!! I like you, old man!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: And we'll go all in, against you!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Whoever wins this one takes it all!!! We'll make it a real man's match for the finale!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Look harder, you idiot, it's black!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: And stop running your mouth off!!

summary: Pages 17–20 focus on dressrosa’s hidden system emerges, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
